strings.app.title: Secure File Vault
strings.locations.heading: LOCATIONS
strings.explorer.choose.location.left: Choose a location on the left.
strings.preview.external.warning.title: Disclosure warning
strings.preview.external.warning: The file can be exposed to another application, temporary files, recent-file lists, thumbnails, or system caches. Continue only if you trust that app.
strings.preview.external.temp: Decrypted copy prepared for external opening.
strings.transfer.upload.title: Upload file
strings.transfer.download.title: Download file
strings.encrypt.title: Encrypt selected file
strings.encrypt.configure.title: Common encryption is not configured
strings.encrypt.configure.body: Set a common encryption password in Settings before encrypting with the common key.
strings.encrypt.select.file: Choose a regular file to encrypt.
strings.decrypt.title: Decrypt selected file
strings.decrypt.select.file: Choose an encrypted file to decrypt.
strings.settings.title: Security settings
strings.settings.description: Configure the application password, encrypted-file password, common encryption key, language, and screen protection.
strings.settings.common.password.new: New common encryption password (empty = keep current)
strings.settings.common.status.empty: Common encryption is not configured yet.
strings.settings.common.reveal.note: Requires the app password or encrypted-file password when configured.
strings.settings.file.password.grace: Do not require encrypted-file password again for N seconds (0 = always ask)
strings.settings.wipe.failed: Delete remembered passwords on failed login
strings.settings.block.capture: Block screenshots and screen recording where the platform allows it
strings.settings.block.capture.note: Android uses FLAG_SECURE. Windows/Linux cannot reliably detect screen capture from Flutter, so SecureVault warns before external disclosure.
strings.snack.bad.password: Incorrect password. Remembered file passwords were cleared.
strings.snack.file.password.mismatch: Encrypted-file password does not match settings.
strings.provider.reserved: Configure and enable the corresponding network/cloud plugin in the plugin manager.
strings.provider.plugin.detail: The plugin executor handles auth, listFiles, fileInfo and fileStream according to its manifest.
strings.about.title: About
strings.about.description: Protected explorer, encrypted previews, language packs, and native vault core details.
strings.encrypt.common.autokey: Common key will be used automatically
strings.encrypt.common.autokey.note: No separate encrypted-file password is configured, so SecureVault does not ask for the common key again.
strings.settings.app.password.mismatch: New app passwords do not match.
strings.settings.file.password.mismatch: New encrypted-file passwords do not match.
strings.settings.common.keyfile.note: When filled and the password field is empty, the common key is derived from this file content.
strings.recent.title: Recent
strings.recent.missing.title: Recent file is unavailable
strings.recent.missing.body: The file does not exist or is currently unavailable. Remove it from recent files?
strings.favorites.title: FAVORITES
strings.explorer.name: Name
strings.settings.recent.sidebar.count: Recent files shown in the sidebar
strings.snack.folder.actions.next: Folder encryption/container actions are available from the context menu.
strings.search.title: Search
strings.search.filters.note: Filters are applied to the current folder view and search results. Dates use YYYY-MM-DD. Duration filters are stored for media-indexed results.
strings.create.csv.separator.note: Default is ;. Use \t or tab for tabulation.
strings.settings.decrypt.names: Decrypt encrypted names in the explorer when possible
strings.settings.fullscreen.hidden.preview.tap: Open files full-window by single tap when preview pane is hidden
strings.settings.auto.dpi: Auto-adjust file text and icon size by device DPI
strings.settings.paths.one.per.line: One path, folder, or mask per line.
strings.android.storage.title: File access is limited
strings.android.storage.body: SecureVault can show more folders and media if Android grants media or all-files access. You can decline now and request it later in settings.
strings.settings.plugins.note: Install plugin ZIP archives. Built-in templates cover WebDAV, FTP, embedded SFTP/SSH, and embedded SMB2/3.
strings.snack.send.next: Send action is prepared in the context menu and needs a platform share adapter.
strings.settings.torrent.disabled: Torrent section is disabled in settings.
strings.media.unavailable: No playable media source is available.
strings.media.decrypted.memory: Encrypted media was decrypted only for the protected playback session.
strings.editor.unsupported: This file type is not editable yet.
strings.editor.image.title: Image editor
strings.editor.draw.hint: Draw directly on the image. White brush works as a simple eraser for drawn layers.
strings.editor.audio.title: Audio editor
strings.editor.video.title: Video editor
strings.editor.ffmpeg.note: Rendering uses ffmpeg when it is available in PATH.
strings.editor.ffmpeg.missing: ffmpeg is not available in PATH.
strings.editor.video.quality: Video CRF quality, lower is better
strings.settings.storage.note: When disabled, settings, plugins, languages, exports, and hidden storage are kept near the program in SecureVaultData.
strings.settings.background.autoclose: Close media when leaving a section
strings.search.mode.name: File name
strings.settings.navigation.fallback: Fallback to locations when going above/into forbidden paths
strings.settings.storage.user: Store settings in the user profile folder
strings.gallery.zoom.hint: Ctrl + mouse wheel changes gallery scale down to year calendar view.
strings.explorer.folder.encrypt.name: Encrypt folder name
strings.explorer.folder.decrypt.name: Decrypt folder name
strings.path.unavailable.ask: This path is unavailable now. If you continue, the current folder may stop working. Continue?
strings.path.root.unavailable: Root access cannot be requested from this desktop build.
strings.selection.unsupported.bulk: This bulk action is not available for the current selection.
strings.selection.zip.local.only: ZIP operations are available only for local folders.
strings.settings.plugins.window.title: Plugin settings
strings.locations.add.empty: Install or configure a network/cloud plugin to add a new location.
strings.locations.profile.title: Connection profile
strings.locations.profile.name: Location name
strings.locations.profile.endpoint.label: Endpoint label
strings.locations.profile.endpoint.optional: This plugin can work without a custom host/port endpoint.
strings.locations.profile.need.name: Enter a location name.
strings.locations.profile.need.endpoint: Add at least one host or URL.
strings.locations.profile.delete.confirm: Delete this connection profile from locations?
strings.locations.profile.plugin.missing: The plugin for this connection profile is not installed.
strings.sort.title: Folder sorting
strings.sort.name: Name
strings.settings.android.lock.resume: Ask for the app password after Android resume
strings.preview.unsupported.title: Unsupported file type
strings.preview.unsupported.body: SecureVault does not have a built-in viewer for this extension. Open it in another application?
strings.editor.text.title: Text / HEX / binary editor
strings.editor.text.convert.note: Choose an encoding for text mode or edit bytes directly in HEX/binary mode. Encrypted previews stay in memory until you explicitly save.
strings.about.contacts: Contacts: SecureVault local build. Add maintainer contacts in the project settings when publishing.
strings.about.features.text.editor: Text files can be edited as text, HEX or binary with encoding conversion and search.
strings.about.features.preview.toolbar: Explorer toolbar separates navigation from search, preview toggle and overflow actions.
strings.about.features.thumbnail.cache: Image, video and audio thumbnails are cached in memory and can be disabled in settings.
strings.about.features.ebook.tts: EPUB/FB2 e-books open in the reader and can be read aloud via platform TTS.
strings.settings.path.dropdown.favorites: Show favorite folders in the path dropdown
strings.settings.background.external.overlay: Allow system floating player when supported by the OS
strings.settings.reset.confirm: Reset all settings to default values?
strings.settings.plugin.no.global.settings: This plugin has no global settings. Create connection profiles from Locations +.
strings.settings.plugin.no.settings: This plugin does not declare editable variables.
strings.jobs.title: Background operations
strings.media.choose.to.play: Choose a track or video to start playback.
strings.about.features.media.session: Audio and video share one media session across preview, full-window mode and mini-player, with resume positions and media-key control.
strings.about.features.plugins: Built-in real plugin executors cover WebDAV, FTP, embedded SFTP/SSH and embedded SMB2/3; plugin manager supports info, settings, export and delete.
strings.about.features.background.jobs: Encryption and recursive folder processing show cancellable background progress at the bottom of the app.
strings.common.name: Name
strings.plugin.music.invalid.site: Enter a section name and a valid site URL.
strings.plugin.music.unavailable: Universal Web Music Parser plugin is not installed.
